user.title: Unitree Account
user.description: Log in with your Unitree account to fetch your robot's credentials automatically.

select_device.title: Select Robot
select_device.description: Choose the robot you want to add.

enter_ip.title: Robot IP Address
enter_ip.description: The robot ({serial}) could not be found automatically. Enter its IP address.

error.auth_failed: Login failed. Check email and password.
error.no_devices: No robots found on this account.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the robot. Check the IP address and network.
